name: O-RADS (Ovarian-Adnexal Reporting and Data System)
description: O-RADS classification template for ovarian/adnexal lesion assessment on ultrasound

findings.technique: Pelvic ultrasound performed using [transvaginal/transabdominal/dual] approach. Gray-scale and color Doppler imaging performed. IOTA criteria applied where applicable.
findings.comparison: Comparison made with [prior US / prior CT / prior MRI] from [date].
findings.limitations: Limited transvaginal evaluation due to [patient factor].

sections.name: Lesion Type
sections.content: Lesion type: [unilocular cyst / multilocular cyst / solid lesion / mixed lesion].

sections.name: Wall Characteristics
sections.content: Wall: [thin (<3mm) / thick (>=3mm)] smooth / irregular. Papillary projection: [present / absent].

sections.name: Echogenicity
sections.content: Echogenicity: [anechoic / low level / debris / ground glass / echoic / complex].

sections.name: Doppler
sections.content: Vascularity: [no flow / peripheral flow / minimal central flow / moderate central flow / abundant central flow].

sections.name: Ascites
sections.content: Ascites: [present / absent]. [Mild / Moderate / Large] volume if present.

impression:
1. O-RADS [X]: [category description]
2. [Lesion type] in [location] measuring [X]cm
3. [Lesion characteristics]
4. Risk of malignancy: [X]%
5. [Follow-up / Surgical consultation / Biopsy] recommended
author: RadReport Templates
